description: A square graphic on a white background. On the left a blue and yellow beverage can labeled CANNED and OPERATION AT LARGE L.A. has a circular inset photo of a man whose face is blurred, with a splash of liquid arcing out of the top. On the right, bold black text reads BREWING TROUBLE, then blue text reads BEER-THROWER GETS ARRESTED, with smaller lines reading Assaulting law enforcement will get you put away and Just don't do it. A U.S. Customs and Border Protection seal and wordmark sit at lower right.
notable_text: CANNED; OPERATION AT LARGE L.A.; BREWING TROUBLE; BEER-THROWER GETS ARRESTED; Assaulting law enforcement will get you put away. Just don't do it.; U.S. Customs and Border Protection
